turns.text: I want to join Gojan college
Great choice! Gojan offers 8 engineering courses plus MBA. Which course are you interested in?
Computer Science
CSE at Gojan is affiliated to Anna University. Admission is through TNEA counselling, code 1123. Have you appeared for 12th?
Yes I got 85 percent
Excellent! With 85% you have a strong chance. Apply at https://forms.gle/W1pEKX2kHno97YfK9 or call +91 7010723984.
Tell me about Gojan placements
Gojan has an active placement cell. TCS, Wipro, Infosys and other companies visit for recruitment. Want to know about a specific department?
What about CSE placements?
CSE students get placed in top IT companies. The placement cell also provides training in aptitude and communication skills.
What package do they get?
Package depends on skills and company. For detailed placement stats, contact the placement cell at +91 7010723984.
Does Gojan have hostel?
Yes! Gojan has separate hostels for boys and girls with furnished rooms, mess facility, WiFi, and 24/7 security.
How much is the hostel fee?
For hostel fee details, please contact the admissions office at +91 7010723984 or email gsbt@gojaneducation.tech.
Is food included?
Yes, the hostel has a mess facility that provides meals. Details about meal plans are available from the hostel office.
What is the campus like?
Gojan has a beautiful 80-acre campus at Redhills, Chennai with modern labs, library, sports grounds, and green spaces.
Do they have WiFi?
Yes, the campus has WiFi connectivity. Plus there's a well-equipped computer center with high-speed internet.
I want to study MBA at Gojan
Great! Gojan offers MBA under the School of Management. Admission is through TANCET exam by Anna University.
What is TANCET?
TANCET is Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test conducted by Anna University for PG admissions. You need a bachelor's degree to apply.
When is the exam?
TANCET is usually held in February-March. Check Anna University website for exact dates. For Gojan MBA info, call +91 7010723984.
Tell me about clubs at Gojan
Gojan has various student clubs - Coding Club, Robotics Club, IEEE Student Branch, NSS, Cultural Committee, and Sports Club.
How do I join the coding club?
You can join during the club registration at the start of each academic year. Contact your department faculty coordinator for details.
Is there a bus from Tambaram?
Gojan provides bus transport from various parts of Chennai. For specific routes and pickup points, contact +91 7010723984.
How long is the journey?
Journey time depends on traffic. The campus is at Redhills. Contact the transport department for route-specific timings.
What about the AI ML course?
B.E. AI-ML at Gojan covers artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, data science. It's a future-oriented programme.
Is it new?
Yes, AI-ML is one of the newer programmes at Gojan, designed to meet industry demand. It is affiliated to Anna University.
What are the job prospects?
AI-ML graduates can work as data scientists, ML engineers, AI developers in companies like Google, Amazon, TCS, and startups.
Tell me about Cyber Security course
B.E. Cyber Security at Gojan covers network security, ethical hacking, cryptography, and digital forensics.
Are there any certifications?
The department may offer industry-relevant certifications. Contact the CSE department for specific certification programmes available.
Does Gojan have scholarships?
Yes! Gojan facilitates government scholarships and offers institutional scholarships based on academic merit.
How do I apply for scholarship?
Apply through the National Scholarship Portal for government schemes. For institutional scholarships, contact the office at +91 7010723984.
கோஜன்ல MBA படிக்கணும்
நல்லது! MBA admission-ku TANCET exam எழுதணும். உங்களுக்கு TANCET பற்றி தெரியுமா?
இல்ல சொல்லுங்க
TANCET என்பது Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test. Anna University நடத்துது. Pass ஆனா Gojan MBA-ல சேரலாம்.
கோஜன்ல என்ன courses இருக்கு?
8 UG courses இருக்கு: CSE, ECE, IT, AI-ML, Cyber Security, Aero, Mech, Medical Electronics. MBA உம் இருக்கு.
CSE பற்றி சொல்லுங்க
CSE department-ல programming, data structures, AI, ML, web development எல்லாம் படிக்கலாம். Anna University affiliated.
placement பற்றி சொல்லுங்க
Placement cell active-ஆ இருக்கு. TCS, Wipro, Infosys வருவாங்க. Training உம் கொடுப்பாங்க.
package எவ்ளோ?
Package skills-ஐ பொறுத்து மாறும். Placement cell-ஐ +91 7010723984-ல contact பண்ணுங்க.
hostel எப்படி இருக்கு?
Boys, girls தனித்தனியா hostel இருக்கு. Furnished rooms, mess, WiFi இருக்கு.
fees எவ்ளோ hostel-கு?
Hostel fees details-க்கு admissions office call பண்ணுங்க: +91 7010723984.
campus எப்படி இருக்கு?
80 acres campus, Redhills Chennai-ல இருக்கு. Labs, library, sports ground, WiFi எல்லாம் இருக்கு.
library நல்லா இருக்கா?
ஆமா, நிறைய books, journals, digital resources இருக்கு. OPAC system உம் இருக்கு.
Hey Gojan, placement pathi sollu
Gojan la active placement cell iruku. TCS, Wipro, Infosys mathiri companies vanthu recruit pannuvanga. Enna therinja konjam?
Package evvalavu kittum?
Package course and skills pathi depend aagum. Placement cell ku directly contact pannalaam: +91 7010723984.
Gojan la admission eppadi?
Engineering ku TNEA counselling la apply pananum. TNEA code 1123. 12th PCM la 45% venum.
Online apply pannalama?
Aama! https://forms.gle/W1pEKX2kHno97YfK9 la online apply pannu. Illa na +91 7010723984 la call pannu.
Hostel pathi sollu
Boys hostel um girls hostel um separate-a iruku. Furnished rooms, mess, WiFi ellam iruku.
Food nalla irukuma?
Mess la meals provide pannuvanga. Vegetarian and non-veg options iruku. Hostel office la details kelu.
AI ML course pathi sollu
B.E. AI-ML course iruku Gojan la. Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Science ellam cover pannuvanga.
Job prospects eppadi irukkum?
AI-ML graduates ku romba demand iruku. Data Scientist, ML Engineer, AI Developer positions la join pannalam. Google, Amazon, startups ellam opportunities iruku.
Campus eppadi iruku?
80 acre campus, Redhills Chennai la iruku. Modern labs, library, sports ground, WiFi ellam iruku. Nalla spacious-a iruku.
WiFi speed nalla irukuma?
Campus WiFi iruku, plus computer center la high-speed internet iruku. Students ku access iruku.
Bus route iruka Tambaram la irundhu?
Aama, Chennai oda pala areas la irundhu bus iruku. Tambaram route pathi transport department la kelu: +91 7010723984.
Timing enna?
Bus timing morning college time ku match-a irukum. Exact time ku transport office la check pannu.
Scholarship iruka?
Aama, government scholarships um institutional scholarships um iruku. Merit basis la kudupanga.
Eppadi apply pananum?
Government scholarships ku National Scholarship Portal la apply pannu. College scholarships ku office ku po: +91 7010723984.
Events nadakkuma college la?
Aama, technical symposium, cultural fest, sports day, guest lectures, workshops ellam nadakkum regularly.
Coding competition irukuma?
Aama, Gojan Clubs under coding competitions, hackathons, project exhibitions ellam organize pannuvanga.
Gojan la research nadakkuma?
Aama, faculty um students um research papers publish pannuvanga national and international journals la.
Students ku opportunity irukuma?
Aama, faculty guidance la students um research projects pannalam. Industry collaborations um iruku.
What is AICTE?
AICTE stands for All India Council for Technical Education. It regulates technical education in India. Gojan is recognized by AICTE.
Why is AICTE important?
AICTE approval is mandatory for all engineering and MBA colleges. It ensures your degree is valid and recognized across India.
Tell me about Aeronautical Engineering
B.E. Aeronautical Engineering at Gojan covers aircraft design, propulsion, aerodynamics. It's affiliated to Anna University.
What are the career options?
Aeronautical graduates can work in HAL, ISRO, airlines, aerospace companies, and defense organizations.
Can I visit the campus?
Yes! You can visit Gojan campus at Redhills, Chennai. Call +91 7010723984 to schedule a campus tour.
What is the best time to visit?
Visit on weekdays between 9 AM and 4 PM when classes are in session. You can see labs, library, and meet faculty.
Tell me about the ED Cell
The Entrepreneurship Development Cell at Gojan nurtures student entrepreneurs with workshops, mentoring, and startup support.
Can students start their own business?
Yes! The ED Cell encourages student startups with guidance, incubation support, and industry connections.
What is the faculty like?
Gojan has experienced professors with doctoral degrees and industry experience. The student-faculty ratio is maintained well.
Are they approachable?
Yes, faculty members are known to be approachable and supportive. They provide mentoring beyond regular classes.
Naan first year join pannaporen, hostel eppadi iruku?
Hostel nalla iruku da. Furnished rooms, mess, WiFi ellam iruku. Boys girls separate hostel.
Ragging irukuma? Bayama iruku
Illa da, tension padaadha. Strict anti-ragging policy iruku. Seniors nalla friendly-a irupanga.
Food nalla irukuma mess la?
Mess la veg and non-veg options iruku. Plus campus la canteen um iruku snacks ku.
Appa kita sollanume, college safe-a nu kekuraru
Campus 80 acre perusu, security iruku 24/7. CCTV cameras um iruku. Safe-a iruku.
Bus iruka? Nanga Tambaram la irukome
Chennai oda pala areas la irundhum bus iruku. Tambaram route pathi transport office la kelu: +91 7010723984.
Fees evvalavu aagum approximately?
Exact fees ku admissions office la kelu: +91 7010723984. Government scholarship um institutional scholarship um iruku.
AI ML vs CSE - edhula join panradhu nalladu?
Rendu me nalla courses thaan. AI-ML future-oriented, CSE broad-a cover pannuvanga. Un interest pathi yosichipaaru.
AI ML la job prospects eppadi?
AI-ML graduates ku romba demand iruku. Data Scientist, ML Engineer positions la Google, Amazon, startups la join pannalam.
CSE la?
CSE graduates ku software development, web dev, cloud computing la opportunities iruku. TCS, Wipro, Infosys recruit pannuvanga.
Naan working professional, MBA join panna mudiyuma?
Aama! Gojan la MBA iruku. TANCET exam ezhuthi admission vaangalam.
TANCET eppothu nadakkum?
Usually February-March la TANCET exam nadakkum. Anna University website la exact dates check pannu.
Part time MBA iruka?
MBA details ku directly admissions office la kelu: +91 7010723984. Avanga full details solluvaanga.
Exam ku eppadi prepare panradhu?
Faculty nalla notes kudupanga. Previous year question papers practice pannu. Library la reference books iruku.
Arrear vandhuducha enna panradhu?
Don't worry, arrear exam next semester la ezhuthalaam. Faculty guidance kudupanga. Maximum try la pass pannidalam.
KT ah carry forward pannalam-a?
Aama, arrear clear panra varaikum carry forward aagum. But jaldi clear panniduradhu nalladu.
Clubs join panna eppadi?
Academic year start-la club registration nadakkum. Coding club, robotics, IEEE, NSS, cultural club ellam iruku.
Coding club la enna nadakkum?
Hackathons, coding competitions, workshops nadakkum. Seniors coding tips um project ideas um share pannuvanga.
Certificate kidaikuma?
Aama, events la participate pannina certificates kudupanga. Resume ku nalla useful-a irukum.
Redhills area eppadi iruku? Naan first time varuven
Redhills developing area, campus near la shops, restaurants iruku. College bus service iruku so travel easy.
ATM iruka near-la?
Aama, Redhills area la ATMs iruku. Campus outside la basic facilities ellam iruku.
Internship eppothu start aagum?
Usually third year la internship opportunities start aagum. Placement cell arrange pannuvanga companies ku.
Stipend kidaikuma?
Stipend company-a pothuthu depend aagum. Some companies paid internship kudupanga. Placement cell la details kelu.
Placement guarantee iruka?
Guarantee solradhu kashtam, but placement cell active-a training kuduthu companies ku connect pannuvanga.
Sports team join panna tryouts irukuma?
Aama, academic year start-la sports tryouts nadakkum. Cricket, football, volleyball, basketball teams iruku.
Inter-college tournament nadakkuma?
Aama, inter-college la participate pannalam. Anna University zone tournaments um irukum.
College day celebrations eppadi irukum?
Annual day la cultural programs, dance, music, drama ellam nadakkum. Chief guests um varuvaanga. Romba fun-a irukum.
Technical symposium iruka?
Aama, department-wise technical symposiums nadakkum. Paper presentation, project expo, coding contests, quizzes ellam irukum.
Outside students participate pannalama?
Aama, inter-college events la other college students um participate pannalam. Prizes um certificates um kudupanga.
Research opportunity iruka undergrad ku?
Aama, faculty guidance la research projects pannalam. National, international journals la papers publish pannalam.
Lab facility nalla iruka research ku?
Modern labs iruku ella departments la um. Research ku equipment and resources available iruku.
Laptop mandatory-a college ku?
Mandatory illa, but CSE, IT, AI-ML students ku own laptop irundha romba useful. Lab la computers iruku.
WiFi speed nalla irukuma college la?
Campus WiFi iruku, plus computer center la high-speed internet iruku. IT department la credentials vaangalam.
